title: Configure Bluetooth for low power
description: Bluetooth should be configured to use low power modes to reduce battery consumption in mobile applications. Failing to do so can lead to unnecessary energy drain and negatively impact user experience. Always enable low energy settings when working with Bluetooth features.
recommendation: Ensure Bluetooth is set to low power or low energy mode in all relevant code paths.

noncompliant:
BluetoothAdapter bluetoothAdapter = BluetoothAdapter.getDefaultAdapter();
bluetoothAdapter.enable(); // No low energy mode set
compliant:
BluetoothAdapter bluetoothAdapter = BluetoothAdapter.getDefaultAdapter();
BluetoothLeScanner scanner = bluetoothAdapter.getBluetoothLeScanner(); // Uses low energy

checks.message: Ensure Bluetooth is set to low power or low energy mode in all relevant code paths.
